news.headline: Navigator Gas corrects the record date for a $0.05 per share cash dividend, now payable on April 3, 2025 to shareholders as of March 24, 2025.
news.summary: Navigator Holdings Ltd. announced a correction to its press release regarding a cash dividend of $0.05 per share for the quarter ending December 31, 2024. The dividend will be paid on April 3, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 24, 2025, instead of March 23, 2025, as previously stated. Navigator Gas is a leading global operator of liquefied gas carriers, specializing in petrochemical gases, LPG, and ammonia transportation. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US inflation rate decreases, providing slight relief amidst upcoming tariffs. #economy #tariffs
Datacolor introduces next-gen portable spectrophotometers, Spectro P Series, for industrial use, ensuring consistency.
news.summary: Datacolor, a renowned company specializing in color management solutions, recently revealed the introduction of the Datacolor Spectro P Series. This cutting-edge portable spectrophotometer platform is designed for use in challenging industrial settings that demand unwavering precision. The launch took place on March 12, 2025 in Lawrenceville, New Jersey. This innovative platform is equipped to meet the needs of industrial environments where maintaining consistency is crucial.

news.headline: Global Wellness Summit partners with UAE Ministry of Health for 2025 Summit in Abu Dhabi, supported by Shura Global Consultancy and Abu Dhabi Investment Gate. Biggest Summit till date.
news.summary: Partnerships with Shura Global Consultancy and Abu Dhabi Investment Gate are set to be integral in organizing the most extensive and ambitious Global Wellness Summit yet. Taking place in Miami on March 12, 2025, this summit is considered the primary meeting of global leaders in the $6.3 trillion wellness industry.

news.headline: FASTSIGNS® is #1 in Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500® list for the 9th year in a row and in top 100 franchises for 13 years.
news.summary: A franchise specializing in signs, graphics, and visual communications has secured a position in the top 100 franchises for the 13th consecutive year. Based in Carrollton, Texas, FASTSIGNS® revealed that it has claimed the top spot as the #1 franchise. This significant achievement was announced on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: INS acquires Source Inc., enhancing networking solutions with wireless, IoT expertise. Promises secure, scalable connectivity.
news.summary: In Richardson, Texas, Industrial Networking Solutions (INS) has officially acquired Source Inc., a well-known technology solutions provider. INS, renowned for its expertise in managing crucial networks, has expanded its capabilities by incorporating Source Inc.'s specialty in wireless networking, IoT, and POTS replacement solutions. This strategic move is designed to bolster INS's capacity to offer secure, scalable, and forward-looking connectivity solutions to various sectors. The acquisition of Source Inc. signifies an exciting development for INS as they continue to strengthen their position in the market.

news.headline: Kasmo reaches top status as Salesforce Summit (Platinum) Partner, highest partnership tier.
news.summary: A reputable global Salesforce consulting company, Kasmo, has recently reached the distinguished Summit (Platinum) Partner status within the Salesforce ecosystem. This partnership marks the highest level of collaboration between Kasmo and Salesforce, highlighting Kasmo's expertise in Salesforce solutions.

news.headline: Sysdig report finds machine identities outnumber humans 40,000 to 1, posing major security challenge for enterprises.
news.summary: A report titled "2025 Cloud-Native Security and Usage Report" has been released by Sysdig, a leading real-time cloud security provider based in San Francisco. The annual analysis delves into current trends in cloud security and usage, showcasing advancements in enterprise security measures while also pinpointing critical areas that require immediate focus. The report covers organizations of varying sizes and industries in North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. It offers valuable insights on cloud security practices and usage patterns, underscoring the importance of ongoing innovation and vigilance in the rapidly evolving digital landscape.

news.headline: Ascent Technologies becomes AscentAI, unveils Regulatory Lifecycle Management Platform for financial services, transforming compliance ops.
news.summary: In Chicago, a company formerly known as Ascent Technologies Inc. has rebranded itself as AscentAI, introducing a new Regulatory Lifecycle Management (RLM) Platform. This platform is designed to assist financial services firms in effectively managing regulatory compliance in a fast and efficient manner. With the regulatory environment constantly changing, AscentAI's RLM Platform aims to provide customers with the tools to navigate these challenges with confidence. The platform is geared towards helping firms adapt to the rapidly evolving regulatory landscape and streamline compliance processes.

news.headline: GoNetspeed finishes $1.6M fiber network in Bethel, serving 3,065 locations with high-speed internet. Residents can order at gonetspeed.com.
news.summary: GoNetspeed has completed the construction of a high-speed 100% fiber internet network in Bethel, Connecticut, providing access to over 3,065 locations in the town. This project was made possible through a $1.6 million investment by GoNetspeed. Bethel's first residents and businesses can now subscribe to GoNetspeed services by visiting gonetspeed.com. This initiative aims to offer future-proof fiber internet to enhance connectivity in the area.

news.headline: Neurosurgery market set to hit $6.8 billion by 2034, with 4.5% CAGR growth. Tech advancements and personalized medicine key drivers.
news.summary: The global neurosurgery industry was valued at US$4.2 billion in 2023 and is projected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.5% from 2024 to 2034, reaching an estimated value of US$6.8 billion by the end of 2034. Advancements in robotic-assisted surgery and neuroimaging are driving innovation in brain and spine procedures. The market is experiencing rapid innovation with robotic navigation, intraoperative imaging, and AI-assisted decision-making transforming surgical outcomes. Key players like Medtronic, Abbott Laboratories, and Boston Scientific Corporation are actively enhancing their product portfolios and engaging in strategic collaborations to strengthen their market positions. The increasing prevalence of neurological disorders and neuro-oncology cases is driving the adoption of neurostimulation devices and regenerative neurosurgical treatments. Technological advancements in neuroscience, AI incorporation, and the use of energy-efficient devices are key market drivers. Various companies are spearheading innovation through continuous research and development efforts.

news.headline: CLEAResult unveils 80 PLUS Ruby energy efficiency standard for data centers in Austin, Texas.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, CLEAResult has introduced 80 PLUS® Ruby, marking the highest level of energy efficiency certification ever set for data center server power supply units.

news.headline: World Trade Organization: European exports and imports were much weaker than anticipated, while Asian exports and North American imports exceeded expectations.
Ignitis Group subsidiary to acquire 100% shares in UAB "Nord Wind Park," a hybrid power plant project in Lithuania.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, AB “Ignitis grupė” revealed that its subsidiary, UAB “Ignitis renewables,” had finalized a deal to purchase all 100% of the shares in UAB “Nord Wind Park.”

news.headline: Ally Financial to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 17, 2025, at 7:30 am ET. #NYSE: ALLY. Check their website.
news.summary: Ally Financial Inc. (NYSE: ALLY) based in Charlotte, N.C., announced that the company will report its first quarter financial results on Thursday, April 17, 2025, around 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Stakeholders and investors can access the results on the Ally Press Room website.

news.headline: Vanessa Cruz Rousseau expands Sprd Media globally, empowering women & minorities, celebrating success in Women's History Month.
news.summary: Celebrating Women's History Month, entrepreneur Vanessa Cruz Rousseau, the founder of Sprd Media in Miami, commemorates the agency's success in empowering nonprofits and small businesses. A woman-owned marketing agency, Sprd Media is dedicated to helping organizations succeed.

news.headline: Ursa Space Systems partners with SkyFi to measure iron ore stockpiles, expanding beyond global oil inventories.
news.summary: Ursa Space Systems, based in Ithaca, New York, revealed on March 12, 2025, the expansion of its collaboration with SkyFi. This extension now encompasses the measurement of iron ore stockpiles, in addition to the joint initiative launched half a year prior focusing on global oil inventories. This upgraded service aims to cater to clients by offering comprehensive insights into various essential resources on a worldwide scale.

news.headline: Mr. Bubble introduces Galaxy Bath Bombs and Soapy Bath-Dough for sensory play & education, maintaining 60+ years legacy.
news.summary: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota, on March 12, 2025, Mr. Bubble retains his title as "America's favorite bath time buddy" for over 60 years with the introduction of two innovative products. The Galaxy Bath Bombs and Soapy Bath-Dough aim to enhance bath time by offering a sensory and educational experience to users. These new additions reinforce Mr. Bubble's commitment to making bath time enjoyable and engaging for consumers across the country.

news.headline: Varsity Brands gets investment from Patricof Co with over 45 elite athletes, focusing on sports and spirit solutions.
news.summary: A group of more than 45 top-tier athletes have made significant investments to boost the advancement of SPORT and SPIRIT solutions. The announcement was made in Dallas on March 12, 2025. Varsity Brands, a prominent provider of team Sport and Spirit solutions under its divisions BSN SPORTS and Varsity Spirit, revealed a strategic partnership with the athletes.

news.headline: FNRP acquires necessity-based retail centers despite market challenges. March 12, 2025 / RED BANK, N.J.
news.summary: FNRP has successfully acquired top-tier retail centers in response to escalating expenses and construction delays. The leading private equity commercial real estate firm located in Red Bank, N.J., revealed its latest move on March 12, 2025. Facing challenges in the industry, FNRP managed to secure high-quality retail properties essential for its growth. This achievement comes at a crucial time with expenses on the rise and project timelines extended. The firm's strategic actions have proven effective, with the latest acquisition enhancing its national portfolio.

news.headline: hireEZ partners with Talroo to access millions of worker profiles, improving hiring efficiency.
news.summary: Customers of hireEZ now have access to Talroo's specialized pool of frontline and skilled trades workers to expedite the filling of essential positions. The announcement was made in Mountain View, California on March 12, 2025. hireEZ, a talent acquisition platform recognized for its AI sourcing, CRM capabilities, automation tools, and analytics, is facilitating this collaboration. This partnership offers hireEZ users the chance to engage with Talroo's unique profiles, enhancing recruitment processes.

news.headline: Sesame Place Philadelphia introduces Hidden Disabilities Sunflower Program on March 29, 2025, a first in North America.
news.summary: Sesame Place Philadelphia is enhancing its accessibility efforts by incorporating the Hidden Disabilities Sunflower program, which will be introduced in the park on March 29. This initiative, starting on March 12, 2025, marks the park's commitment to inclusivity and support for individuals with hidden disabilities. Sesame Place Philadelphia stands out as the pioneering theme park in North America by actively promoting accessibility.

news.headline: Wild Nectar Collection promotes sustainable travel with focus on planet, communities, and memorable experiences.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon on March 12, 2025, Wild Nectar Collection introduces "Travel That Makes the Flowers Grow," a pioneering initiative promoting sustainable and community-focused travel experiences. This innovative approach aims to provide travelers with opportunities to support the environment and local communities while creating memorable journeys.

news.headline: Luxury Collection unveils Salterra Resort in South Caicos, part of Marriott's 30+ properties, boosting tourism.
news.summary: The esteemed hospitality brand, The Luxury Collection, continues to build on its reputation for offering exclusive and culturally enriching getaways by unveiling an opportunity for visitors to discover the unspoiled beauty of South Caicos Island. This announcement was made in Bethesda, Md., on March 12, 2025, by the renowned hotel group, a key player within Marriott Bonvoy's extensive collection of more than 30 prestigious properties worldwide.

news.headline: Inventor creates "THE BALLOON CINCH" to simplify balloon arches, increasing convenience for special events.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2025, an inventor from Leighton, Ala., shared the inspiration behind THE BALLOON CINCH. With a vision for simplifying the creation of balloon arches for gatherings, the inventor introduced a new decorating strip design aimed at enhancing convenience during party decorations. This innovation aims to revolutionize the process of creating balloon arches for events with its user-friendly approach.

news.headline: Pegasus Distillerie introduces Minty, an organic mint liqueur made with 3 types of mint from the Alps.
news.summary: A renowned distillery from Burgundy has broadened its range of high-quality, organic spirits by launching MINTY, a new mint liqueur. This refreshing drink is made from a blend of three types of organic mint sourced from the Alps, offering a smooth and invigorating taste. The product is specially curated for a modern post-dinner gathering known as the après-ritivo.

news.headline: Inventor from GA invents Rooftop Sunshade Accessory ADA-125 to filter sunlight & UV rays.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2025, an inventor from Lawrenceville, Ga. unveiled the groundbreaking ROOFTOP SUNSHADE ACCESSORY. This Kevlar mesh covering filters bright sunlight and harmful UV rays, providing a protective design for rooftops. The invention aims to offer a more efficient way to block out UV rays and maintain cooler temperatures indoors.

news.headline: Thumzup Media authorizes $1M share repurchase program after raising $8.2M at $5 per share. 700+ advertisers onboard.
news.summary: A company recently completed a common-stock only offering, raising $8.2 million by selling shares at $5 each. This offering coincided with its listing on the Nasdaq in October 2024. Insiders also bought around $62,000 worth of common stock at prices ranging from $3.20 to $4.73 in the last trading window. The company's platform has seen significant growth, with over 700 advertisers now using it.

news.headline: Investment firm Black Dragon Capital to attend Credit Unions for Kids Wine Auction, following a $20,000 donation to Children's Miracle Network.
news.summary: Black Dragon Capital℠ has reaffirmed its commitment to the Credit Union Community by extending further support after the For A Bright Future Foundation's generous donation of $20,000 to the Children's Miracle Network. The announcement was made in Boca Raton, Florida on March 12, 2025. Black Dragon Capital℠ attended the event to show its continued dedication to the cause.

news.headline: Evergreen Home Loans opens new branches in Albuquerque and Carlsbad, New Mexico, led by Area Manager Barry Abt. Expanding across Western U.S.
news.summary: A home loan lender called Evergreen Home Loans, known for its full-service offerings in origination, funding, and servicing in the Western U.S., has made a significant move by expanding its operations to New Mexico. This expansion includes the establishment of new Evergreen branches in the state.

news.headline: Clinical trial services market to reach US$101.86 billion by 2030, growing at 8.9% CAGR from US$60.76 billion in 2024.
news.summary: In March 12, 2025, in DELRAY BEACH, the worldwide Clinical Trial Services Market hit US$60.76 billion in 2024 and is projected to achieve a 8.9% CAGR, soaring to US$66.59 billion by 2025 and an anticipated US$101.86 billion by 2030. Key drivers include the expanding...

news.headline: Business Intelligence market to hit $56.9B by 2032, expected CAGR of 7.2% from 2025-2032, driven by cloud adoption.
news.summary: The Business Intelligence market is projected to show a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.2% between 2025 and 2032. This growth is mainly fueled by the increasing adoption of cloud technologies and the rising demand for data visualization solutions. The report, titled 'Business Intelligence Market Size, Share, Forecast,' indicates a positive outlook for the industry during these years.

news.headline: Bank of Russia suggests allowing select investors to trade crypto under experimental regime, with $1.1M in assets required. Other residents banned. New regulations aim to increase market transparency and expand investment opportunities. Qualified firms may join the experiment.
news.summary: The Russian central bank is proposing a three-year experimental regime to allow select Russian investors with at least $1.1 million in securities and deposits to trade cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin. The Bank of Russia aims to increase transparency in the local market and offer investment opportunities to experienced individuals. The ban on using cryptocurrencies for payments in Russia remains in place, with strict penalties for violations. The central bank is also considering allowing qualified companies to invest in cryptocurrencies, which could lead to the emergence of a "Russian MicroStrategy." This move is part of Russia's efforts to regulate the cryptocurrency market and create new opportunities for investors while emphasizing the risks involved with investing in volatile assets.

news.headline: Motivity receives $27M investment from Five Elms Capital to enhance innovation and operations in clinical SaaS for ABA providers.
news.summary: Motivity, a top provider of clinical software as a service (SaaS) solutions for Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) providers specializing in treating children with autism, revealed on March 12, 2025, a substantial $27 million investment from Five Elms Capital, a renowned software investment company. This new infusion of capital will significantly boost Motivity's capacity to expand its services and advance its technology in order to better serve its clients.

news.headline: Brightspot CMS listed in AWS ICMP for US Federal Gov, providing secure, AI-powered content management for agencies.
news.summary: Brightspot CMS has expanded its services to AWS ICMP in Reston, Virginia, providing secure, AI-powered content management for U.S. government agencies. This move aims to offer increased scalability and security. To find out more, visit brightspot.com.

news.headline: World Trade Organization: Goods trade barometer at 102.8, nearly unchanged from the previous reading of 102.7 from last December.
OpenLight and Tower Semiconductor create 400G/lane modulators on silicon photonic wafers for data centers and AI connectivity, enabling high-volume production for next-gen 3.2T optical communication.
news.summary: Cutting-edge technology advancements have led to the development of a high-capacity silicon photonics platform capable of supporting 400 gigabits per lane. This innovation is designed to cater to the demands of future optical communication systems, such as those required for data communication and artificial intelligence applications, with a total throughput of 3.2 terabits per second.

news.headline: Correction to Navigator Gas’ press release for Q4 2024 results. Record date for cash dividend incorrect.
news.summary: A correction has been issued by Navigator Holdings Ltd. ("Navigator Gas" or the "Company") regarding the first paragraph of its press release dated March 12, 2025. The correction pertains to the record date for the cash dividend for the quarter ending December 31, 2024.Navigator Holdings Ltd. trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol NVGS.

news.headline: Acumatica partners with Venture Engineering in motorsport, expanding a successful 18-month relationship.
news.summary: Acumatica, a prominent provider of cloud-based business management solutions, unveiled a new motorsport partnership with Venture Innovations, the racing arm of Venture Engineering, a top engineering and motorsport entity in Oxfordshire, England. This collaboration strengthens their existing 18-month customer connection, during which Venture Engineering efficiently integrated Acumatica Manufacturing Edition into its engineering and racing operations. This strategic alliance is set to leverage the expertise of both companies to achieve mutual success in the motorsport industry.

news.headline: World Trade Organization: Goods trade barometer little changed at start of 2025, but trade policy uncertainty looms.
Canada's new reciprocal tariffs begin at 12:01 am Thursday.
Toll Brothers to open new luxury home community, Riano Ridge, in Loveland, Colorado at 3109 Westcliff Drive in late spring 2025.
news.summary: Luxury home builder Toll Brothers, Inc. has revealed plans for its latest community, Riano Ridge, located at 3109 Westcliff Drive in Loveland, Colorado. The community is set to open for sales in late spring 2025, with site preparation currently underway. Toll Brothers, Inc., known as the top builder of luxury homes in the nation, announced the upcoming launch of Riano Ridge as its newest project.

news.headline:
New Political Trade Reported: US TREASURY NOTE - Sell - undisclosed - $15,001 - $50,000 -  - Kelly Morrison 
 transaction date: 2025-02-28 
 filed at date: 2025-03-11
Canada Finance Minister: List of additional products affected by Canada's counter tariffs includes computers, sports equipment and cast iron products.
Atlantix Partners rebrands as Acclarity, introduces new organizational structure.
news.summary: A company in Fort Lauderdale, Florida previously known as Atlantix Partners has rebranded itself as Acclarity. The company, now operating under the new name Acclarity, offers various financial advisory services. The organization has introduced a revamped organizational structure. Formerly, Atlantix Partners was set up as a group of companies, each functioning under its original corporate name. This initiative comes as a way to streamline operations and create a more cohesive identity for the company. Acclarity is associated with several entities including CFO Alliance in Florida, CFO Strategic Partners in Florida, Kaiser Consulting in Ohio, and Stage 1 Fina.

news.headline: Israel's ZIM reports Q4 sales up 80% to $2.17B, with 409% EBITDA growth. 982k TEUs carried at $1,886 per TEU. EPS $4.66.
news.summary: ZIM Integrated Shipping Services Ltd (NYSE:ZIM) announced a significant surge in sales for the fourth quarter, reaching $2.17 billion, marking an 80% increase from the previous year and surpassing the projected $2.06 billion. This growth was primarily attributed to higher freight rates and carried volume. The company transported 982 thousand TEUs during the quarter, reflecting a 25% increase year over year, while the average freight rate per TEU rose by 71% to $1,886. Adjusted EBITDA skyrocketed by 409% year over year to $967 million, resulting in margins of 45%, up from 16% in the same quarter of the previous year. ZIM, headquartered in Haifa, Israel, achieved an EPS of $4.66, a substantial improvement from last year's loss of $1.23, exceeding the anticipated $3.49. Operating cash flow for the year stood at $3.75 billion compared to $1.02 billion a year ago. Capital expenditures totaled $214 million in the quarter, an increase from $116 million in the corresponding period last year. Furthermore, ZIM's total cash position saw a noteworthy rise, increasing by $451 million from $2.69 billion as of December.

news.headline: Putin considers accepting ceasefire terms with modifications, according to reports.
Canada Finance Minister: Canada's tariffs will include steel products worth C$12.6 bln, aluminum products worth C$3 billion, and additional US goods worth C$14.2 billion.
Canada Finance Minister: Canada will impose 25% retaliatory tariffs on US goods worth C$29.8 bln from March 13th.

Crypto whale loses $308M in leveraged Ether trade as market volatility hits; trader liquidated on 50x leveraged position for $308M+. ETH downtrend continues with risks to $1,800 due to lack of new projects on network amid global trade war concerns and ETH ETF outflows.
news.summary: A crypto whale lost over $308 million on a leveraged Ether position, with liquidation of more than 160,234 ETH at a time when ETH traded at $1,900. The trader rotated all BTC holdings into the leveraged Ether trade before the liquidation, during a volatile market period impacted by global trade war concerns. ETH price has dropped over 53% since December 16, 2024, peaking above $4,100. The downtrend is attributed to macroeconomic concerns and low activity on the Ethereum network. The ongoing sell-off is affecting the entire market, with fears over tariffs impacting all risk assets. US spot Ether ETFs have seen net negative outflows, adding to the market instability. The analysts believe $1,800 will be a critical level to watch for ETH.
